form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at Warragul over 400m. Last start finished 4th in a Mix 6/7 on March 29 over 435m at this track behind Reality Secret beaten 15 lengths (25.28). Has been around the mark at his last couple and should make his presence felt.

form.formComment: Solid performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 435m (24.78) beating Comanche Chief in Maiden on April 1. Has hit winning form and is worth thought again.

form.formComment: Had a low draw last time over 460m at Warragul but was in traffic and failed to finish. Returns here after a 13 months spell. Rates a key player and gets chance to atone.
